The question aims to find out how many times the Green Bay Packers were NFC champions after the year 1995. We need to look at all rows where the team is "green bay packers" and the season year is after 1995.

Filter out useless columns.

The question is asking to determine how many times the Green Bay Packers were NFC champions after 1995. Since each row represents a season and the "team" column indicates the winner of that season, we need to group by the "team" column to count the occurrences of the Green Bay Packers as champions. We can use the f_group_column(team) operation to group the seasons based on the winning team to analyze this situation.

The question is asking to determine how many years after 1995 the Green Bay Packers were NFC champions. To find out, we need to filter the data based on the "season" column for years greater than 1995 and then count the number of occurrences where the "team" column is "Green Bay Packers". Since the "season" column contains numerical data, we can use the f_filter(season > 1995) operation to narrow down the data and then count the relevant entries.
The Green Bay Packers were NFC champs in 1996, 1997, and 2010. All of these years are after 1995. Therefore, the answer is that the Green Bay Packers were NFC champs in 3 years after 1995.
